name: project-state
description: Turn any multi-stakeholder project into a system where routine reporting is a byproduct of normal work. 34 skills for milestones, objectives/KPIs, phase gates, document curation, status reports, funder/grant compliance, and a local kanban — driven by swappable compliance packs (PIC, SR&ED, grant-Canada, board/investor, client-services, agile, open-source).
